name: Mekong Giant Catfish
conservationEfforts: WWF Mekong program works to maintain river connectivity. Community fishery management in Cambodia and Thailand. Dam mitigation measures proposed for Mekong mainstream dams.
description: The world's largest freshwater fish, historically reaching 3 meters and 300 kg. It has declined by over 80% in just 13 years due to overfishing and dam construction on the Mekong River.
